chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-425 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 3856/25 2.For hearing of main case 13-11-2025 None present for the applicant. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the applicant, which shows that the applicant and his counsel are not vigilant to proceed with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
